summary: Tested iteration 62 bug fix: Direct '➕ Créer un nouveau compte courant' option in dropdown. All features verified working correctly. The dropdown now shows 3 sections: 'Recettes de la caisse', existing accounts, and '➕ Créer un nouveau compte courant (XXX F)'. Clicking the create option triggers window.confirm, and confirming creates a new dedicated account and allocates the expense. Cancel behavior verified - no action taken when dismissed.
critical_code_review_comments: CaissePage.jsx lines 1015-1037: allocateExpenseToAccount() correctly handles '__create_new__' sentinel value, triggers window.confirm with proper message format, and calls POST /api/expenses/{id}/allocate-account-smart with mode='create_new'
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1665-1680: Dropdown for 'Achats validés' correctly includes '__create_new__' option with green styling and dynamic amount
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1828-1843: Dropdown for 'Achats terminés' also includes '__create_new__' option
Both dropdowns are now visible EVEN when availableAccounts is empty (admin can create account without pre-existing ones)
Toast message 'Nouveau compte créé (XXX F) et dépense imputée.' correctly displayed after successful creation
seed_data_creation: Created test expenses (30000 F, 25000 F) for testing. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 added direct '➕ Créer un nouveau compte courant' option in the 'Payé depuis' dropdown. Key points: (1) Option appears in BOTH 'Achats validés' AND 'Achats terminés' views for Admin. (2) Clicking triggers window.confirm with message showing account name and amount. (3) Confirming creates new account via POST /api/expenses/{id}/allocate-account-smart with mode='create_new'. (4) Toast 'Nouveau compte créé (XXX F) et dépense imputée.' appears on success. (5) Cancel/dismiss does nothing (no toast, no allocation). (6) Dropdown visible even when 0 existing accounts (fixes previous bug where dropdown was hidden).

frontend: Dropdown 'Payé depuis' visible in 'Achats validés' for Admin - VERIFIED
Dropdown 'Payé depuis' visible in 'Achats terminés' for Admin - VERIFIED
Dropdown contains 3 sections: 'Recettes de la caisse', existing accounts, '➕ Créer un nouveau compte courant (XXX F)' - VERIFIED
Clicking '➕ Créer un nouveau compte courant' triggers window.confirm - VERIFIED
Confirm message format: 'Créer un NOUVEAU compte courant dédié de XXX F pour cet achat ? Nom : Recharge auto pour ...' - VERIFIED
Confirming creates new account and allocates expense - VERIFIED
Toast 'Nouveau compte créé (XXX F) et dépense imputée.' appears - VERIFIED
Badge 'imputé : Recharge auto pour ...' appears after allocation - VERIFIED
Cancel/dismiss does nothing (no toast, no allocation, dropdown unchanged) - VERIFIED
Existing account with insufficient balance still triggers window.prompt with 3 options - VERIFIED (regression test)
